text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's no good... At this rate... Bright will—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's good to see you hard at work, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, you should stop for now. That fear
building up inside of you cannot be easily shaken
off, no matter how desperately you may try.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-I'm not scared!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't underestimate my assessment. Precisely
how much of your running do you think I've
observed up to now?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What's frightening you so much?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I can't stop shaking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I can still hear the crowd's cheers from when I
crossed the finish line at the Oka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
When I realized how many voices there were and
how many eyes were fixed on me, watching my
every move...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Memories from the past suddenly flooded my
mind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And it was like I was once again that little girl,
crying and sobbing as she ran...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ever since then, that scene just keeps replaying in
my mind, and I can't help but start shaking...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I won't be able to compete in the
Japanese Oaks! I've worked so hard to get to this
point, and yet! And yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm so scared! I'm scared I'll revert to my past self
in front of everyone... and in front of Bright...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Is that truly what you fear?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Is what you truly fear the possibility that you'll
revert to your former self? Do you truly think
trembling will stop you from competing?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Those are terrifying prospects indeed. But I think
your true fear lies elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: My true fear?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
When I was competing in the Japanese Oaks, I
felt the same fear you are likely experiencing
now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You did?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As the Japanese Oaks drew closer, I felt an
immense pressure weighing down on me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I felt I had to become my ideal self no matter
what. I had to fulfill the dreams of those who
wished to see me accomplish what my mother
had.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The more I felt that I absolutely could not lose,
the more I froze with fear. I was terrified I
wouldn't accomplish that dream or reach that
ideal.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, I was eventually able to shift my
perspective on that fear.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I pondered the origin of that anxiety, and that
was when I had an epiphany.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The fact that I was even harboring such fears
proves that there are people expecting great
things from me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And... they only do so because I continuously
challenge myself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I will ask you once more, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What is it you fear? What is it you are truly afraid
of?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (I see now... The thing I'm really afraid of—)

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
That was incredible, Mejiro Dober! Do your best
at the Japanese Oaks too!

text_block_list.name: Female Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
Dober! You were so cool! I'll come see you at the
Japanese Oaks for sure!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Now then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Take my hand, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I'm afraid of letting Bright and everyone else
down by betraying their expectations...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(But I'm only afraid of that because there are
people who believe in me...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(And because I'm trying so hard to push myself
toward even greater heights!)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh. It seems you've reached the same conclusion
I did.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
To look at it differently, the source of your fear is
actually what brought you all this way.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Should you ever find yourself bereft of
confidence and frozen in place, listen to the
words of those who believe in you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am certain you can do this. After all, Ryan and
Bright believe in you, as do I...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And your trainer as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: All of you... believe in me... Even my trainer...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to your performance at the
Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I haven't managed to stop my
shaking...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Despite knowing the real reason why I shake, I'm
still scared. Even so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run in the Japanese Oaks for all the
people that expect greatness from me!
choice_data_list: Let me carry some of your fear too.
Let me carry some of your fear too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've made up my mind. From now on, I will believe
in her more than anyone else, and my cheers for
her will be louder than the rest.
choice_data_list: Your battle is mine to fight too.
Your battle is mine to fight too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Why do you always spew such embarrassing stuff?
Honestly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer, why are you always so... Still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She mutters the rest of her thoughts in such a
small voice that they're swallowed up by the night
air.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She mutters the rest of her thoughts in such a
small voice that they're swallowed up by the night
air.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, I can tell by the determined light
shining in her eyes that Mejiro Dober is back in
fighting form.
